scenarios.title: Single-Cell Omics and Scanpy Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: AnnData/MuData setup, Scanpy preprocessing/QC, graph analysis, marker genes, probabilistic scvi-tools models, multimodal/spatial omics, and single-cell plotting/reporting.
scenarios.role: Use scvi-tools for probabilistic single-cell omics analysis with AnnData/MuData setup, model selection, training, downstream analysis, save/load, Hub workflows, and advanced extension/autotune tasks.
scenarios.read_when: The request names `scvi-tools` or asks for package-specific APIs, CLIs, configs, data/model artifacts, error messages, workflows, or repository maintenance that match this project.
scenarios.best_for: advanced operations, annotation and query, core models, data setup, downstream analysis, and 3 other focused workflows.
scenarios.avoid_when: another repo skill in this scenario matches the user's task, package, model family, data format, serving backend, or workflow more directly.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `scvi-tools` when the request names `scvi-tools`, centers on probabilistic single-cell omics analysis with AnnData/MuData setup, model selection, training, downstream analysis, save/load, Hub workflows, and advanced extension/autotune tasks, uses its APIs or CLIs, references its configs/artifacts/errors, or asks for repository workflows in single cell omics and scanpy workflows. Then route to advanced operations, annotation and query, core models, or data setup when those focused workflows match.
